rationale: Build on the current winner by extending the late EMA snapshot set from projection weights to every matrix already targeted for transpose-aware final int8 quantization. The best run showed mlp.fc.weight is the key new quantization-sensitive tensor; smoothing those weights during the quant-aware tail can reduce last-step noise at serialization time without spending artifact bytes or changing the training path earlier in the run.
title: EMA Over Transposed MLP Expansion Finalizer
